triggers.name: performance_trigger
triggers.description: Upon the service of a Trigger Notice, the priority of payments for both interest and principal is altered to a post-trigger waterfall, protecting senior noteholders.
triggers.consequence: Principal and interest distribution switches to a post-enforcement priority of payments, ranking Class A notes senior to Junior Notes for both principal and interest.

citation.excerpt: in respect of the obligations of the Issuer to repay principal on the Notes following the service of a Trigger Notice...

triggers.name: principal_deficiency_ledger_shortfall
triggers.description: If there is a debit balance on the Principal Deficiency Ledger, Interest Available Funds are used to cure the shortfall.
triggers.consequence: Interest Available Funds are applied to reduce the debit balance on the Principal Deficiency Ledger to zero.
triggers.section_reference: Pre-Trigger Notice Interest Priority of Payments, item (vii)

citation.page_or_row: Pre-Trigger Notice Interest Priority of Payments
citation.excerpt: in or towards making good any shortfall reflected in the Principal Deficiency Ledger until the debit balance, if any, of the Principal Deficiency Ledger is reduced to zero

issuer_covenants: The Issuer has covenanted not to enter into any transactions that are not contemplated in the Transaction Documents.
The Issuer is subject to restrictions on the activities that may be carried out by it.

Each Other Issuer Creditor has undertaken in the Intercreditor Agreement not to petition or commence proceedings for a declaration of insolvency against the Issuer until two years and one day after the Notes have been redeemed in full.
